proof: function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { (not x0 <= x1 and x1 <= x0) = x0 > x1 }[Real](Real.one_half, 0)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { (not x0 <= x1 and x1 <= x0) = x1 < x0 }[Real](Real.one_half, 0)
function(x0: Real) { rpow(x0, Real.one_half) = sqrt(x0) }(0)
function(x0: Real) { rpow(x0, Real.one_half) = sqrt(x0) }(x)
function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0.max(x1) = x0 = x0 >= x1 }[Real](sqrt(x), 0)
function[T0: lib(order).LinearOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 > x1 or x0.max(x1) = x0 }[Real](sqrt(x), 0)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { (not x0 <= x1 and x1 <= x0) = x0 > x1 }[Real](Real.one_half, 0)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { (not x0 <= x1 and x1 <= x0) = x1 < x0 }[Real](Real.one_half, 0)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 > x1 or x0 != x1 }[Real](Real.one_half, 0)
function(x0: Real) { rpow(x0, Real.one_half) = sqrt(x0) }(x)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 >= x1 or x0 < x1 }(sqrt(x), 0)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 < x1 or x0 != x1 }[Real](sqrt(x), 0)
function(x0: Real) { rpow(x0, Real.one_half) = sqrt(x0) }(x)

goal: rpow(x, Real.one_half + Real.one_half) = rpow(x, Real.one_half) * rpow(x, Real.one_half)

proof: function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 >= x1 = x1 <= x0 }[Real](x, 0)
function(x0: Real) { 0 * x0 = 0 }(sqrt(x))
function(x0: Real) { not x0 > 0 or x0.is_positive }(x)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { not x0.is_positive or not x1.is_positive or (x0 * x1).is_positive }(x, x)
function(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or x0 > 0 }(x * x)
function(x0: Real) { rpow(x0, Real.one_half) = sqrt(x0) }(x * x)

goal: rpow(x * x, Real.one_half) = exp(Real.one_half * log(x * x))
proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { (if x0 > 0 { exp(x1 * log(x0)) } else { if x1 = 0 { 1 } else { 0 } }) = rpow(x0, x1) }(x * x, Real.one_half)

goal: Real.one_half * (log(x) + log(x)) = Real.one_half * log(x) + Real.one_half * log(x)
proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 * x1 + x0 * x2 = x0 * (x1 + x2) }(Real.one_half, log(x), log(x))

goal: Real.one_half * log(x) + Real.one_half * log(x) = (Real.one_half + Real.one_half) * log(x)
proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { x0 * x1 + x2 * x1 = (x0 + x2) * x1 }(Real.one_half, log(x), Real.one_half)
function(x0: Real) { 1 * x0 = x0 }(log(x))
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 >= x1 = x1 <= x0 }[Real](x, 0)
function(x0: Real) { 0 * x0 = 0 }(x)
